name: openwiki
description: Company OpenWiki knowledge base exposed through hosted OpenWiki MCP proposal mode.

credentials.label: OpenWiki proposal token
credentials.description: Scoped service-account bearer token allowed to use OpenWiki proposal-mode MCP tools.

credentialHelp: Create a scoped OpenWiki service-account token for proposal-mode MCP access, store it as OPENWIKI_PROPOSAL_TOKEN or this bundle credential, and rotate it through OpenWiki auth token tooling.
